glue.partition.storagedescriptor.CfnAbou: Describes the physical storage of table data.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.BucketC.Description: A list of reducer grouping columns, clustering columns, and bucketing columns in the table.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.Columns.Description: A list of the `Columns` in the table.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.Compres.Description: `True` if the data in the table is compressed, or `False` if not.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.InputFo.Description: The input format: `SequenceFileInputFormat` (binary), or `TextInputFormat`, or a custom format.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.Locatio.Description: The physical location of the table. By default, this takes the form of the warehouse location, followed by the database location in the warehouse, followed by the table name.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.NumberO.Description: The number of buckets.  You must specify this property if the partition contains any dimension columns.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.OutputF.Description: The output format: `SequenceFileOutputFormat` (binary), or `IgnoreKeyTextOutputFormat`, or a custom format.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.Paramet.Description: The user-supplied properties in key-value form.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.SchemaR.Description: An object that references a schema stored in the AWS Glue Schema Registry.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.SkewedI.Description: The information about values that appear frequently in a column (skewed values).

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.SortCol.Description: A list specifying the sort order of each bucket in the table.

glue.partition.storagedescriptor.StoredA.Description: `True` if the table data is stored in subdirectories, or `False` if not.
